filename: Ideas to meet decision makers - Public UK_.docx
summary: This document outlines internal sales strategies for targeting UK GP practices and Practice Managers, including ideas for networking events and pilot programs. It contains draft email templates designed to pitch the AI phone agent tool to healthcare providers, focusing on QOF deadlines and workload reduction. Feedback from a stakeholder requests more concrete targeting lists and specific contact methods for PCNs and practices in Manchester.
